source: Generated from holybro_fastener_instances.json, holybro_fastener_families.json and current selection hierarchy.
rule: canonical part -> Blender subpiece -> priority/shared primitive fastener instance ids
notes: priorityFastenerInstanceIds define the preferred subpiece layer for a fastener.
sharedFastenerInstanceIds define additional subpieces that should show the fastener as context, without stealing priority/history.
low/review confidence rows must be confirmed in Unity/Blender before being treated as final engineering truth.
